title: Grave markers at the end of EoE
display_title: Grave markers at the end of EoE
wikitext:
[]: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Feb 02, 2018 3:12 pm I've read online that in the original scripts, Shinji was to set up grave markers for those who had died before Instrumentality, including Asuka, and that she would kick hers down upon returning to human form. Supposedly, you can still see these markers in the final film, but I've never seen any ones but Misato's, which was just a broken telephone pole with her pendant nailed to it. Where on earth are the rest of these markers?!

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 02, 2018 3:37 pm One quick Google image search for "evangelion gravemarkers" later: I really hope, for the sake of municipal safety, that you've never encountered a telephone pole that's only slightly wider than Misato's pendant.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by zlink64 » Fri Feb 02, 2018 5:02 pm I wonder if he actually expected people to figure that out. Seems so vague. Anno has high standards for his audience.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Fri Feb 02, 2018 5:11 pm zlink64 wrote: I wonder if he actually expected people to figure that out. Seems so vague. Anno has high standards for his audience.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Sat Feb 03, 2018 12:34 pm I'm an idiot. That shot is so iconic, and yet I always thought they were more destroyed telephone poles.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Bryan » Sun Feb 04, 2018 4:09 pm Those can't be grave markers, there was nobody to set them up. They are there before Shinji and Asuka wake up and they're the first ones to wake up. It could be leftover design, but that leftover design can't really be thought of as what it was originally. In the end, they're just telephone poles or whatever.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Feb 04, 2018 5:34 pm Shinji was there before Asuka, long enough to set up the markers. That's why one of them has Misato's cross on it (which she gave him); which is enough to tell us he did it. Some people argue that the sign of corrosion on the cross (presumably from the nail) says that Shinji has been alone for weeks by the time Asuka arrives.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 04, 2018 5:53 pm Bryan wrote: that leftover design can't really be thought of as what it was originally

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Feb 04, 2018 6:05 pm pwhodges wrote: Shinji was there before Asuka, long enough to set up the markers. That's why one of them has Misato's cross on it (which she gave him); which is enough to tell us he did it. Some people argue that the sign of corrosion on the cross (presumably from the nail) says that Shinji has been alone for weeks by the time Asuka arrives.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Feb 04, 2018 7:13 pm How do you work that out? If Asuka was back first, who had set up the grave marker for her to kick down?

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 05, 2018 2:17 am Bryan wrote: In the end, they're just telephone poles or whatever.

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Mar 12, 2018 2:38 pm If I may offer my own interpretation of how it went down...

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Mar 12, 2018 4:14 pm ^ That thread gave me a good chuckle remember how the moon phase thing came about and then was promptly forgotten until the topic came up again and I rediscovered it going hey guys we're really big idiots, look at what we forgot! Which brings me to the question why doesn't passage of time in the final scene have a theory and analysis page? That is stuff that has been forgotten before and god knows where all the relevant threads are buried now. It'd be great if all the info was compiled on an easy to find page so that never happens again. The entire passage of time thread is an incomprehensible mess now thanks to all the broken links lol

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 14, 2018 2:32 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: why doesn't passage of time in the final scene have a theory and analysis page?

[]: Re: Grave markers at the end of EoE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 14, 2018 4:42 pm RE: who came back/woke up first? We see Shinji return when he emerges from the Sea of LCL prior to the title card transition into the final scene. He watches as Lilith's body crumbles. SPOILER: Show
